title: NLP-003-distinguish-between-morphology-and-syntax-in-nlp.
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-003 Distinguish between morphology and syntax in NLP.

 3. Distinguish between morphology and syntax in NLP.
答案要点:
| 维度 | Morphology | Syntax |
|------|-----------|--------|
| 研究对象 | 词的内部结构 | 句子中词的关系 |
| 分析单元 | Morphemes (词素) | Phrases, Clauses |
| 应用 | Stemming, Lemmatization | Parsing, POS Tagging |
| 示例 | "un-happi-ness" | "The dog barks" (SVO) |

质量评分: 90/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---

Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐
Category: NLP...
